beliefs.belief: My anxiety levels are currently high and disrupt my daily functioning.
beliefs.evidence: My anxiety is acting up again.

beliefs.belief: My fear of a seizure relapse severely limits my ability to engage in routine physical activities.
beliefs.evidence: I was going to try to go for a walk, but I'm worried what if I have another seizure.

beliefs.belief: External support systems (like StoryBot) are genuinely helpful for immediate emotional regulation.
beliefs.evidence: Thanks, StoryBot. I really appreciate your support!

beliefs.belief: Disclosing the details of seizures to medical professionals is a crucial and non-negotiable requirement.
beliefs.evidence: I need to tell them about the seizures for sure.

downstream_scores.dominant_theme: Managing anxiety and limiting behaviors stemming from a chronic health condition (epilepsy/seizures).
downstream_scores.suggested_follow_up: Since telling your doctors is a priority, would it help to talk through what you are most worried about when you discuss this next week?
